name: Syntropy MCP Tools
description: Dynamic MCP tool surface — discovers tools from configured MCP servers via tools/list and registers them into the agent loop.

servers.description: MCP servers to discover tools from. Empty/absent means the plugin stays inert.

id.description: Server id (e.g. "kg", "sj") — tags descriptors and prefixes name collisions.

baseUrl.description: MCP base URL; tools/list and tools/call go to <baseUrl>/mcp.

auth.description: Auth mode. static-key reads a Bearer from apiKeyEnv per request; m2m-exchange is fail-closed until the token-exchange client (B2) lands.

apiKeyEnv.description: static-key only: env var holding the Bearer token (e.g. KG_MCP_API_KEY). Missing/empty env fail-closes the server.

resource.description: m2m-exchange only: canonical resource URI the exchanged token is minted for (e.g. https://…/mcp).

commitTools.description: B4 confirm allowlist: mutating commit-tool names on this server that the Confirm Governor gates (preview→confirm→commit). A descriptor's ui.commit_tool must be listed here to be gated.

refreshSeconds.description: Tool-catalog cache TTL and periodic-refresh interval. Default 300.

maxStaleSeconds.description: Fail-closed horizon: past this age mutating tools are dropped. Default 3 × refreshSeconds.

servers.label: MCP Servers
servers.help: Per-server discovery config. No servers configured means no discovered tools (plugin inert).
